codeReview.summary: The finalization commit introduced startup prewarm diagnostics, metrics, and bootstrap-time warming, and the later fix commits 84c94b0 and fd3c6ff corrected the original pathname-only attribution and non-2xx-as-timeout misclassification issues. In the current combined branch state, startup prewarm target matching is semantic, failed targets are reported distinctly from budget exhaustion, later targets still run after non-timeout failures, and the exposed diagnostics/metrics surfaces align with the validation contract.

summary: Pass. Reviewed startup-prewarm-finalization together with follow-up fixes 84c94b0 and fd3c6ff; no current material blocking issue remains in startup prewarm behavior or in the finalization slice once those mandated follow-up fixes are considered.
